nasb.text: When they had eaten enough, they began to lighten the ship by throwing out the wheat into the sea.

esv.text: And when they had eaten enough, they lightened the ship, throwing out the wheat into the sea.

cnv.text: 大家吃飽了，把麥子拋在海裡，好減輕船的負荷。

ccb.text: 吃饱了以后，为了要减轻船的重量，他们把麦子抛进海里。

csbs.text: 大家吃饱了饭，就把麦子扔到海里，减轻船的负荷。
